query:
SELECT t.id, t.taskId, t.taskDetail, ts.staffId, s.name as staff_name, s.email as staff_email
FROM tasks t
LEFT JOIN task_staff ts ON t.id = ts.taskId
LEFT JOIN staff s ON ts.staffId = s.id
WHERE t.taskId = 'TASK-gS5tOnnChN';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT t.id, t.taskId, t.taskDetail, ts.staffId, s.name as staff_name, s.email as staff_email
FROM tasks t
LEFT JOIN task_staff ts ON t.id = ts.taskId
LEFT JOIN staff s ON ts.staffId = s.id
WHERE t.taskId = 'TASK-gS5tOnnChN';
